trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: implement Google Drive service-account JWT token exchange helper plus an authenticated/audited probe route with provider failure coverage.
scope: Add a server-side Google Drive OAuth credential path (service-account JWT -> access token) and a probe route that validates root folder + index sheet access without exposing secrets, with integration tests covering missing config/creds, token exchange failure, and Drive access-denied responses.
changes: Added functions/_lib/google-drive.ts implementing service-account JWT signing (RS256) and token exchange against https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token, plus a small Drive file-metadata probe helper using the access token.

Added functions/api/evidence/drive-probe.ts, an authenticated + audited route that exchanges for a Drive token and probes the configured evidence root folder + index sheet, returning safe metadata and clear error states without exposing secrets.

Added tests/google-drive-probe.integration.test.mjs covering missing session, missing Drive config, missing Drive credentials, token exchange failure, Drive access denied, and success cases (including audit-event assertions and secret redaction checks).
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-backlog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md to reflect the new Drive OAuth probe evidence for MVP-013/SC-003.
known_limits: This pass implements the server-side Drive OAuth credential path and probe coverage; student evidence file-byte upload and access-controlled retrieval endpoints remain pending.
Probe tests stub fetch() responses; follow-on work should validate the probe route against a real Drive-enabled environment once secrets are configured in Cloudflare Pages.
next_actions: Configure Cloudflare Pages secrets GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY and verify /api/health reports googleDriveCredentialsConfigured=true.

Implement evidence file upload + retrieval (streaming proxy) routes that write evidence_artifacts.drive_file_id, enforce canAccessStudent, and avoid exposing Drive storage IDs; extend tests for provider errors and forbidden access.
